description: Legacy-named rewrite-obligation metadata for Yul identity gap classification. These entries are planned justifications for rewrite families; they are not checked Lean proofs of Morpho invariants.

renameOnly.proofObligation: Prove alpha-renaming of matched helper functions preserves control flow, storage effects, and ABI-visible behavior.

renameAmbiguous.proofObligation: Prove deterministic rename-family resolution preserves call targets and does not merge semantically distinct helpers.

families.proofObligation: Prove address decoder helper rewrites preserve decoded values, revert conditions, and memory cursor movement.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `abi_decode_bool` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `abi_decode_bytes` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `abi_decode_struct` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `abi_encode_address` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Prove struct encoder helper rewrites preserve emitted ABI layout, offsets, and padding rules.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `abi_encode_uint256` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Classify and prove the Solidity-only `array_allocation_size` Yul helper-family delta is semantics-preserving or an intentional compiler-boundary difference for Morpho.
Prove width-specialized checked_add helpers preserve success/revert behavior and resulting values across uint-width normalization.
